controls.title: RBAC and Service Accounts: minimize service account token exposure and permissions
Pod Security Standards: no privileged containers, no privilege escalation, non-root users, minimal capabilities, restricted volumes
Network Policies and CNI: workloads governed by NetworkPolicies
General Policies: namespaces, seccomp profiles, applied security contexts

notAssessable.title: Control Plane Components
notAssessable.reason: API server, scheduler, and controller-manager flags exist on live control-plane nodes.

notAssessable.title: etcd
notAssessable.reason: etcd configuration and encryption-at-rest are live-cluster state.

notAssessable.title: Control Plane Configuration
notAssessable.reason: Authentication and audit configuration are assessed against the running cluster.

notAssessable.title: Worker Nodes
notAssessable.reason: Kubelet configuration and node file permissions exist only on live nodes.
